title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at JSW Steel

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at JSW Steel
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Production Engineer with drive and ambition, JSW Steel in Delhi is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About JSW Steel:
JSW Steel is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Six Sigma

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with JSW Steel!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
